title: Live The Moment Lyrics Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam Song Lyrics
singerName: Haricharan, Nakul, Premgi Amaren, Venkat Prabhu
stanzas:
Song: Live The Moment
Singer: Haricharan, Venkat Prabhu, Premgi Amaren, Nagulan, Shanthnu Bhagyaraj
Music: Thaman
Lyricist: Madhan Karky
Movie: Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam

Sogam podhum nippaatidu
Sorgam poga ticket edu.
Coolaa vazha thittamidu
Kooththaattam kooda nippaatidu.

Teaser illaa, trailer illaa
Movie peru vazhkkadaa
Aduththa scene theriyavenaam
Therinjaa vazhve bore-udaa.

Live the moment, live the moment
live the moment live the moment now

Odum raththaththil minsaaram senjukitta
mannil minvette illaiyada.
Kadhal muththathil minsaram senjukitta
nenjil minvette illaiyada.

cigarettum venaam, sarakellaam venaam
warning-u potte kollvaangadaa
neethaan un hero, neethaan un villain
un vazhva neeye kondaadudaa.

Makeup venaam vesam venaam
unmaiyya nee vazhu da.
packup aagum naalai enni
vazhum vazhve bore-udaa

Nethu kanneera innaikku sindhaadhada
indha nimishaththil nee vazhuda.
naalai rupaava innaiku ennaadhada
indha nodiyodu vilaiyaadudaa.

T20 kooda palasaagi pochu
T10 un vazhkka run thaedu.
miss panna ballu kiss pannum stumpa
boldaagaama boldaa nee aadu.

Kaau illaa scor-u illaa
aattam peru, vazhkkadaa.
adutha over theriyavenaam
therinjaa vazhve boruda..

live the moment , live the moment
live the moment , live the moment now

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Live The Moment?

The song encourages listeners to embrace life and live in the present moment.

Who composed the music for Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam?

Thaman S composed the music for the film.

Who are the singers of Live The Moment?

The song is sung by Haricharan, Nakul, Premgi Amaren, and Venkat Prabhu.

What is the release year of Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam?

The movie was released in 2014.

What emotions does Live The Moment evoke?

The song evokes feelings of motivation and energy, encouraging a positive outlook on life.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Live The Moment from the movie Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam is an energetic anthem that inspires listeners to seize the day. With its upbeat tempo and motivational lyrics by Karky, it encourages living life without regrets. Thaman S's vibrant composition, combined with the dynamic vocals of Haricharan, Nakul, and others, makes it a perfect fit for celebrations and workouts. The song captures the essence of enjoying every moment and living life to its fullest potential.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Live The Moment from the film Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam. This dynamic track, brought to life by the voices of Haricharan, Nakul, and others, is a testament to Thaman S's musical genius. With Karky's inspiring lyrics, this song is a perfect anthem for living life to the fullest.
stanzaMeanings: Enough with the sadness, stop it. Get a ticket to go to heaven. Plan to live coolly. Even stop the dancing.
No teaser, no trailer, life is the movie. You don't need to know the next scene. If you know, life is boring.
Live the moment, live the moment, live the moment, live the moment now.
If you connect electricity to running blood, it won't spark on the ground. If you connect electricity to a love kiss, it won't spark in the heart.
No need for cigarettes, no need for drinks. They will warn you and kill you. You are your own hero, you are your own villain. Celebrate your life yourself.
No need for makeup, no need for disguise. Live truthfully. Thinking about tomorrow's end makes life boring.
Don't let yesterday's tears fall today. Live in this moment. Don't worry about tomorrow's form, play with this moment.
Even T20 has become old, seek runs in T10 life. If you miss the ball, kiss the stump, play boldly without getting bowled.
No cow, no score, life is the game. You don't need to know the next over. If you know, life is boring.
live the moment, live the moment, live the moment, live the moment now
